chunks.title: Jonathan warns David
chunks.reason: Jonathan intercedes with Saul and relays the warning to David.

chunks.title: David's victory and Saul's attack
chunks.reason: David defeats the Philistines and Saul attempts to kill him with a spear.

chunks.title: Michal's escape plan
chunks.reason: Michal helps David flee and deceives Saul's messengers.

chunks.title: Saul prophesies at Ramah
chunks.reason: Saul sends messengers who prophesy, followed by Saul himself prophesying.
